TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KacCon-Teaching Weaving_abas_ipay

S.FORM: temawaR Raw qa qatiw sa taqsian aimi temawaR smanu a kay kayhuiniq qaRabi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天要去學校，我們昨天晚上開會說的。
We'll go to school tomorrow; this is announced at our meeting last night.

S.FORM: m i azas ala tu benina pibeRuR tu benina nani azas tu Raq zinku qaniau sa sa saspawan saspawan zinku siRab qaRabi 'nay sinsi yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 我跟他們講要帶香蕉，要砍香蕉樹，還要帶酒。要倒酒的，我昨天跟領班說了。
I told them that they should bring bananas for cutting and that they should also bring wine. For pouring wine, I told this to the leader last night.

S.FORM: amawaR si ka walu duki si qawtuka ti kalamaz pa ita qayau maqzi tataipaqan ay lazat.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天八點早點來，有從台北來的人。
We should come early at o'clock tomorrow; there are people from Taipei.

S.FORM: tmaita timaita m m mpasyasingay.
S.TRANSL: （他們）來看我們、照相。
(They come) to see us and take pictures.

S.FORM: tu bibeRuR tu benina nani zinna X sunis a yau nani kin kinspat sunis a yau tazungan Runanay uzusa.
S.TRANSL: A:（來看我們）砍香蕉樹的嗎? I:四個女孩子兩個男的。
A: (To see us) cut banana trees? I: Four girls and two boys.

S.FORM: titiana ya sanis aisu.
S.TRANSL: A: 是誰要削香蕉樹皮？是你嗎？
A: Who is going to bark banana trees? Is that you?

S.FORM: ita qunianna pa tmud tu sunis a yau sanis ay ka.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道是誰要去教小孩子（台北來的學生）。
I don't know who is going to teach the children (i.e. the students from Taipei).

S.FORM: 1aw1 aisu mtud ay 2tu sunis a yau2 2tudaka sunis a yau2 tu sanisan si u pun ti pibeRuR sanis pama si.
S.TRANSL: A:我要教小孩子削香蕉樹皮。 I:就是你要去教小孩子。 A:嗯... I:先把香蕉樹砍好，再削樹皮。
A: It's you who will teach the children. I: I'll teach the children to bark banana trees. A: Um... I: After cutting down banana trees, peel off the bark.

S.FORM: pun ti smanis si pawaRi ti si nutuz ti m s sanis sinas ti si nutuz ti zinna.
S.TRANSL: 剝完香蕉樹皮後，把樹皮曬乾然後接結...削樹皮...分線絲，然後接結。
After barking banana trees, dry the bark and braid...bark...tear the bark into threads, and then braid the threads.

S.FORM: kinspat 1sunis a yau1 1qumqumni1 iza maiseng 2ala2 ala pa iku tu 3maiseng ay3 3tu maiseng ay3 4sasanisan4 4ala pa iku tu maiseng4 paqenanem isu baibudan.
S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] A:還沒曬乾怎麼（弄線）呢？ I:我要拿曬乾的。 A:乾的是要用來削樹皮的。 I:我要拿曬乾的。 A:只有你一個老人家嗎？

[Translation missing] A: How could you (braid the threads) without drying (the bark) first? I: I'll take the dried (bark). I: The dried (bark) is for barking. I: I'll take the dried (bark). A: Are you the only elder?

S.FORM: mituRung yau mituRung ti ala pa ti tu mituRung sanaqnaqu si.
S.TRANSL: (我)會拿用香蕉樹皮撕下的線做成的線球，（教學生）就這樣弄。
(I'll) take the ball of banana threads and (teach students) to do so.

S.FORM: u mituRung 'nay tu snazau ay mituRung.
S.TRANSL: A:嗯。 I:這個就是用香蕉樹皮撕下的線做成的線球。
A: Um. I: This is the ball of banana threads.

S.FORM: u temawaR tayan sataitaanna.
S.TRANSL: A:嗯。 I:明天在那邊的時候要看的。
A: Um. I: This is to be seen there tomorrow.

S.FORM: Ralis qatuRuzaansu pun ti miza si Risay ti Risay ti imi.
S.TRANSL: A:你可以馬上做完嗎？ I:做完了的時候，我們會把線纏繞在織布機上。
A: Can you finish it immediately? I: After finishing this, we'll wind threads onto the loom.

S.FORM: azas a 1yau1 Risayan tayan 2Raw2 1yau1 2yau2 tayan uzusa 3Risayan tenunan3 tayan 3o m3 tenun ti tayan qaya si.
S.TRANSL: A:帶用來將線繞在織布機上的工具。 I:那邊有兩台織布機。 A: -- I:我們在那邊織布。
A: Bring the tool for winding threads onto the loom. I: There are two looms there. A: -- I: We'll weave there.

S.FORM: yau qa qawanay pataqsian 'nay saiza tmenun Risay ti Risay ti X en tud zanti nitudsu ya 1pataqsian 'nay1.
S.TRANSL: A:那些學生要練習織布嗎？I: 他們把線繞在織布機上。 A:之前你有教過學生嗎？
A: Will the students practice weaving? I: They wound threads onto the loom. A: Have you taught students before?

S.FORM: 1nitudan ti1 nayau ngatu ngatu ti 2azasanna pa na pataqsian a yau saiza ya pitnunan2 alaanna pa ya azasanna pa temawaR si tenunan yau ti uzusa.
S.TRANSL: I: 沒有教的很完整（一半一半的教）。 A: 我們編的東西學生要帶走嗎？ I:做完的布有兩個，他們明天要帶走。
I: I didn't teach them the complete process (I only taught them by halves). A: Will the students take away what we've woven? I: There are two bolts of cloth and they'll take them away tomorrow.

S.FORM: a azas ti aiku tu benina tu nisyangatuku taRbabi ay 'nay.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I:我要帶早上開始做的香蕉。
A:-- I: I'll bring the banana bark which I started to do in the morning.

S.FORM: tanian pa ti pibeRuR tu benina.
S.TRANSL: 在哪裡砍香蕉樹？
Where will you chop banana trees?

S.FORM: tipanbulungan.
S.TRANSL: 潘武郎那邊嗎？
At Utai's place?

S.FORM: yau tatuqeban na zana na sa'mayan na qaqu ya kwa.
S.TRANSL: 在學校廚房的後面。
In back of the school kitchen.

S.FORM: yau kwa tatuqeban ah usa nipadumaanna ni asing.
S.TRANSL: 有（香蕉樹）啊，在（學校廚房）後面。 A:不是Asing種的嗎?
There are (banana trees) in back of (the school kitchen). A: Aren't they planted by Asing?

S.FORM: zana situan zana qaqu 'nay tazian zana ni zau 'nay zani tibanday ni.
S.TRANSL: 學生種的學校管，這邊的是這個...那個...偕萬來的。
Those (banana trees planted by) students (belong to) the school. Those at this place (belong to) ...... Banday.

S.FORM: zani banday ay.
S.TRANSL: A:偕萬來的。
A: Banday's.

S.FORM: talibeng ay iki a kwa zani banday ay benina Raw tayan pa ti pibeRuR saiza.
S.TRANSL: I:池塘下面的。 A:是偕萬來的香蕉樹嗎？可能在那邊砍香蕉樹。
I: Those down the pond. A: Are they Banday's banana trees? Perhaps (we'll) chop (banana trees) there.

S.FORM: tayan ti usiq ma si ala pa tu benina yau si.
S.TRANSL: 只會拿一棵。
We'll take only one banana tree.

S.FORM: u ala pa ti tu azat a zau ay benina saRabas ay si.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I:會拿這麼小的香蕉樹。
A: -- I: (We'll) take the banana tree which is this short.

S.FORM: naquni ay zau benina zau sangian a zau ay benina.
S.TRANSL: 要做的是像那樣的香蕉（指上面所提到的那種小的香蕉樹）。
The banana tree we'll do is this kind (i.e. the short banana trees mentioned above).

S.FORM: zinku pa ti qaya smanu saiza.
S.TRANSL: 我這樣講（給那些大學生聽）。
I told (the students) thus.

S.FORM: qakinani Rakiaan mawtu ay taipaq ay lazat Rakinani smani nitingaRna 'nay paqnanem qawini 'nay sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: A:多少台北人要來？ I:叫幾個人(來)不知道。 A:就只有一個那個小孩子要來。
A: How many people from Taipei will come? I: I don't know how many people are told (to come). Only one child (will come).

S.FORM: taitaakita si.
S.TRANSL: 我們看看。
Let's see.

S.FORM: yau ti Raciang tiana X yau dadu tiRaciang yau ti tiRaciang iza mi mai qa mai syuqai tu sikawmaan si taRnina qaya na taypaq ay.
S.TRANSL: 有潘金英，還有誰... A:一定有潘金英。沒有介紹我們的語言的話（翻譯我們的語言），台北的人就不會知道。
There is Raciang, and who... A: There will be Raciang for sure. If there is no one to introduce (i.e. translate) what we say, people from Taipei cannot understand it.

S.FORM: o zinna o.
m pun ti quni pa ti smani.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I:做完了，還有什麼工作？
A: -- I: After finishing the job, I don’t know what we’re going to do?

S.FORM: ala ti tu Raq pun ti tenun saqabiyan u saqutuan qumuni smani.
S.TRANSL: 我們會帶酒，在一天或半天內編織完後，我不知道要做什麼。
We'll bring wine, after finishing weaving in one day or half a day. I don't know what to do.

S.FORM: X Ralis pun ti nayau si pasyasin si panmeng ti pasyasin pun ti si qan ti imu tu Raq pasi qayau qanannumi satutu.
S.TRANSL: XXX。 A:工作完成後，一定會照相。 I:一定會照相。 A:工作結束後，你們會喝酒，可能也會吃午餐。
XXX. A: After finishing the job, you'll surely take pictures. I: (We'll) take pictures. A: After finishing the job, you'll drink wine and perhaps have lunch.

S.FORM: ita mai smanu.
S.TRANSL: 不知道,沒有講
I have no idea. They didn't tell us.

S.FORM: qawman yau 'may naqaya sapaqanan timaimu.
S.TRANSL: 一定有給你們吃的飯。
There must be rice for you to eat.

S.FORM: mai smanu kinani ay smani tanawyan mai smanu.
S.TRANSL: 沒有講那邊有幾個人。
They didn't tell us how many people there will be.

S.FORM: m mai smanu tu kinani ay ala tu kelawkaway ay ta a walu duki zinna Raw.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I:沒有講有幾個拿那個工作的人。 A:八點嗎？
A: -- I: They didn't say how many people got the job. A: At eight o’clock?

S.FORM: peitiam qawtuka ti zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說，「八點你們就要來」。
"You have to come at eight," he said.

S.FORM: m taRbabi si ya yau a qaya tiiza qaya tisyuRwa tangi qaya tu.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I: [翻譯漏失] A: XXX。SyuRwa剛才有來。
A: -- I: [Translation missing] A: XXX. SyuRwa just came.

S.FORM: qawtuka taRbabi patuqazakaniq syasin na tamaku suRabka taRbabi peitiam zinna.
S.TRANSL: 她說，「明天要來，我們要把爸爸的相片掛上去，早上八點早一點來。」
She told me, 'Come (to my place) tomorrow morning. We're going to hang my father's photo (on the wall). Come earlier at eight tomorrow morning.'

S.FORM: azasaka ti nwazingku pasazui si.
S.TRANSL: 我要拿著我的東西去那邊（之後就可以直接到學校）。
I'll take my things over there.

S.FORM: pazaqisaka ti qawqa iku matiw sa qaqu ya tataqsian nani.
S.TRANSL: （照片）掛上去了，我才可以去學校。
I'll hang (the photo on the wall first) so that I can go to school afterwards.

S.FORM: oh puna pa isu tayan saiza sepaw tiwaqan qawqa isu matiw ti taqaquan.
S.TRANSL: 你先到那邊拜Waq，才可以去學校。
You go there first to pour wine for Waq and you may go to school afterwards.

S.FORM: nayau ti.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣。
That's it.

S.FORM: ninima patuqaz qaya.
S.TRANSL: 那麼快就要掛上去？
(How come they) hang the photo immediately?

S.FORM: mai mai tu sizapkan ay si.
S.TRANSL: 沒有四十天的規定。
(They) don't have the custom of (hanging the photo after) forty days.

S.FORM: oh izaanna kebalan pisapatanna ti zana ay Raw mai.
S.TRANSL: A: -- I:他們隨便弄。當初葬禮是用噶瑪蘭的，沒有信什麼（四十天的規定）。
A: -- I: They did it informally. They held the funeral in Kavalan's way, so they don't have such a custom.
